content: agent2: implementing get_image_mimetype() lazy accessor in llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py (ImageBlock class). Will touch this file's ImageBlock/image_to_base64 area.

agent2: heads up, I've already landed get_image_mimetype() in types.py. Current image_to_base64 body is now: 'if not self.image: return self' / 'self.get_image_mimetype()' / 'self.image = base64.b64encode(self.image)' / 'return self'. New method get_image_mimetype() sits right after it (before resolve_image), guards on 'if not self.image_mimetype and self.image: guess = filetype.guess(self.image); self.image_mimetype = guess.mime if guess else None' then returns self.image_mimetype. If you refactor image_to_base64 to use your normalize_image_bytes helper, please keep the self.get_image_mimetype() call (using raw/decoded bytes before encoding) so mimetype guessing still runs against unencoded bytes -- otherwise we'll clobber each other. Let me know when you've edited so I can re-check the diff.
